sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الْمَائِدَةُ فِي بِلَادِ الشَّامِ وَشَمَالِ إِفْرِيقِيَا بِشَكْلٍ كَبِيرٍ عَلَى زَيْتِ الزَّيْتُونِ وَالْخُضْرَوَاتِ الْمَوْسِمِيَّةِ، مِمَّا يَجْعَلُهَا مِثَالًا لِلنِّظَامِ الْغِذَائِيِّ الصِّحِّيِّ.
sentences.translation: Trpeza u Levantu i Sjevernoj Africi u velikoj mjeri se oslanja na maslinovo ulje i sezonsko povrće, što je čini primjerom zdrave ishrane.
sentences.translationEn: The table in the Levant and North Africa relies heavily on olive oil and seasonal vegetables, making it an example of a healthy diet.

sentences.arabic: يُؤَكِّدُ خُبَرَاءُ التَّغْذِيَةِ أَنَّ الِاعْتِمَادَ عَلَى الْبُقُولِيَّاتِ مِثْلَ الْحُمُّصِ وَالْعَدَسِ يُسَاهِمُ فِي تَوْفِيرِ الْبْرُوتِينَاتِ النَّبَاتِيَّةِ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Nutricionisti naglašavaju da oslanjanje na mahunarke poput humusa i leće doprinosi obezbjeđivanju biljnih proteina neophodnih tijelu.
sentences.translationEn: Nutrition experts emphasize that relying on legumes such as chickpeas and lentils contributes to providing the plant proteins necessary for the body.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَخْلُو مَائِدَةٌ عَرَبِيَّةٌ مِنَ السَّلَطَةِ الْخَضْرَاءِ أَوْ التَّبُّولَةِ الَّتِي تَمْتَازُ بِغِنَاهَا بِالْفِيتَامِينَاتِ وَالْأَلْيَافِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ الَّتِي تُحَسِّنُ الْهَضْمَ.
sentences.translation: Nijedna arapska trpeza nije potpuna bez zelene salate ili tabulea, koji se odlikuju bogatstvom vitamina i prirodnih vlakana koja poboljšavaju probavu.
sentences.translationEn: No Arab table is devoid of green salad or tabbouleh, which are characterized by being rich in vitamins and natural fibers that improve digestion.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ اِتِّبَاعَ هَذَا النَّمَطِ مِنَ الْأَكْلِ لَا يُشْبِعُ الْجُوعَ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ يَقِي أَيْضًا مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ الْمُزْمِنَةِ وَيُعَزِّزُ النَّشَاطَ الْبَدَنِيَّ لَدَى الْأَفْرَادِ.
sentences.translation: Praćenje ovog načina ishrane ne samo da utoljuje glad, već i štiti od hroničnih bolesti i podstiče fizičku aktivnost kod pojedinaca.
sentences.translationEn: Following this pattern of eating not only satisfies hunger, but also protects against chronic diseases and enhances physical activity in individuals.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَسْعَى الْكَثِيرُونَ حَوْلَ الْعَالَمِ إِلَى اِقْتِبَاسِ هَذِهِ الْعَادَاتِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ لِتَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ حَيَاتِهِمْ وَالْحِفَاظِ عَلَى رَشَاقَتِهِمْ الدَّائِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga mnogi širom svijeta nastoje usvojiti ove prehrambene navike kako bi poboljšali kvalitetu svog života i očuvali trajnu vitkost.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, many around the world seek to adopt these dietary habits to improve their quality of life and maintain their lasting fitness.
